title: Ayanami Ikusei Keikaku W Asuka Hokan Keikaku wa doko
display_title: Ayanami Ikusei Keikaku W Asuka Hokan Keikaku wa doko
wikitext:
[]: Ayanami Ikusei Keikaku W/ Asuka Hokan Keikaku wa doko?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 07, 2006 8:02 pm Anyone know where Shin Seiki Evangelion: Ayanami Ikusei Keikaku With Asuka Hokan Keikaku can either be "accquired" or bought? It's probably hella expensive, but it sounds amusing. (I've seen pics of the Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku on the GAINAX Eva section and it looks very, um, fanservicy. ; (episode 5 neeked Rei's "breast nubbins" are showing, Asuka's episode 8 entrance includes seeing her panties...) ...Though thinking about it, I'd guess I'd need something to convert my PS2 to recognize this as it's a Japanese game... *shrug*

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Nov 08, 2006 5:43 pm tried ebay
